briefdescription.para: Create a list of all devices with acquired data, honour yoking dependencies.

xrefdescription.para: is not very accurate as we should store the yoking dependencies in a permanent way instead of hoping that ListOfFollowerITC1600s is accurate

simplesect.para: list of all devices with data in the format ITC18USB_Dev_1;ITC1600_Dev_1;ITC1600_Dev_0 (2,3);

briefdescription.para: Parse the given popup item string created by GetPopupMenuDeviceListWithData() and return the device name, type and possible follower list.

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText list, WaveRefWave dataRef, wave rate, variable startIndex, string deviceType, string deviceNumber)
memberdef.name: AppendEntries

briefdescription.para: Searches for sweep waves from all devices.

parameterdescription.para: ListBox wave, see GetDownsampleListWave() for the format
wave with wave references to all data waves
wave with the sampling rates in kHz of all data waves
first unused index into the passed waves

simplesect.para: index of the last valid entry into the passed waves

briefdescription.para: Updates all waves holding acquired data info.
Disable the equalize checkbox if all data waves have the same rate.
Returns a list of values 1/k*var with k = {1..10} or k = {2..10} if constantRates == 1.
Returns a list of all possible equalize/downsampling rates.

detaileddescription.para:
Folders and waves managed by code in this file
Object type
Name
Purpose
Function
DFREF
$dataPath
location of all the GUI and temporary data
GetDownsampleDataFolder()
Wave
$dataPath:dataRef
Holds wave references to all waves currently displayed in the list box
GetDownsampleDataRefWave()
Wave
$dataPath:rateWave
Holds all rates in kHz for each wave.
GetDownsampleRateWave()
Wave
$dataPath:sweepProperties
Used by the list box to show the properties of each sweep
GetDownsampleListWave()
